stemHtml: During a training flight you want to demonstrate engine failures by producing the greatest possible yawing moment. For a twin-engined propeller aeroplane with counter-rotating propellers, you would fail:

options.a: Any engine, as the thrust arm for both engines is equal.
options.b: The left engine, because its thrust arm is longer.
options.c: The left engine, because the thrust arm of the right engine is longer.
options.d: The right engine, because the thrust arm of the left engine is longer.
